name: UniqueGiftColors
description: This object contains information about the color scheme for a user's name, message replies and link previews based on a unique gift.

fields.name: model_custom_emoji_id
fields.description: Custom emoji identifier of the unique gift's model

fields.name: symbol_custom_emoji_id
fields.description: Custom emoji identifier of the unique gift's symbol

fields.name: light_theme_main_color
fields.description: Main color used in light themes; RGB format

fields.name: light_theme_other_colors
fields.description: List of 1-3 additional colors used in light themes; RGB format

fields.name: dark_theme_main_color
fields.description: Main color used in dark themes; RGB format

fields.name: dark_theme_other_colors
fields.description: List of 1-3 additional colors used in dark themes; RGB format
